public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as tax witness.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Shirsh, that reads as someone investigative, magically literate, and discreet, balancing inquiry with regulation, and the habits of a tax witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of tax witness in and around House Shirsh, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House Shirsh workable through the obligations of tax witness while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shirsh.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around House Shirsh, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of tax witness visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Veyn Mistglass needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to House Shirsh.
Veyn Mistglass can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Veyn Mistglass communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Shirsh: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
